heading: How Your Event Lead Pipeline Will Look
description: From booth traffic to CRM-ready opportunities — this is the flow we manage for every event we attend.

steps.title: Pre-Event Outreach
steps.description: We build targeted prospect lists, run LinkedIn and email warm-up campaigns, and schedule booth meetings before the show opens. Arriving with pre-booked conversations gives your team an immediate pipeline advantage.

steps.title: On-Ground Lead Capture
steps.description: Our team deploys to the event floor, actively engages target accounts, and captures contact data in real time using CRM-integrated tools — no badge-swaps that go nowhere.

steps.title: Live Qualification
steps.description: Every contact is scored on-site against your ICP: job title, company size, buying authority, and stated timeline. Only buyers who meet your criteria advance to MQL status.

steps.title: CRM Handoff
steps.description: Qualified leads are delivered to your sales team within 24 hours of the event closing, with full context notes, qualification scores, and recommended next-step actions.

stages.label: SQLs
stages.sublabel: matched to your ICP with decision authority

stages.label: Pipeline
stages.sublabel: handed to your sales team with context
